news.t: Mega-Cap Concentration Has Hidden Active Growth’s Best Story: Inside the F/m Emerald Special Situations ETF (SPIT) and a 1st-Percentile Morningstar Track Record
Emerald Advisers and F/m Investments Launch F/m Emerald Special Situations ETF (SPIT)

holdings.infoBox: SPIT is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.91%, Microsoft at 8.31%, Apple at 6.05%, Amazon.com at 5.20%, and Alphabet at 4.51%.

overview.description: The F/m Emerald Special Situations ETF (SPIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US stocks involved in special situations that are considered to have distinctive growth drivers independent from general market trends. Companies may be of any size or industry. SPIT was launched on Oct 6, 2025 and is issued by F/m Investments.

data.text: The F/m Emerald Special Situations ETF (SPIT) ranks in the 1st percentile of Morningstar’s Large Growth category, 3rd of 1,077 funds over the trailing 1-year period as of 3/31/2026, with…
